docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,810.54 FILED BY BARROS SANTANA, IAGO AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DIRK THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-06-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF IAGO BARROS SANTANA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIRK THOMAS JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-06-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IAGO BARROS SANTANA IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT DIRK THOMAS JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE. THE COURT ALLOWS THE CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IAGO BARROS SANTANA IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DIRK THOMAS JOHNSON. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT DOSE NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
